# Generated by openai (gpt-3.5-turbo)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for a Network Security Group that allows our remote development team to access Azure VMs. Include rules for RDP (port 3389), SSH (port 22), HTTP (port 80), and HTTPS (port 443) from any source (0.0.0.0/0). The team works globally and needs flexible access.
# Category: cloud_network_security

resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups
    apiVersion: '2020-06-01'
    name: devTeamNSG
    location: [resourceGroup().location]
    properties:
      securityRules:
        - name: Allow_RDP
          properties:
            protocol: Tcp
            sourceAddressPrefix: '*'
            destinationPortRange: '3389'
            access: Allow
            direction: Inbound
          priority: 100
          sourcePortRange: '*'
          destinationAddressPrefix: '*'

        - name: Allow_SSH
          properties:
            protocol: Tcp
            sourceAddressPrefix: '*'
            destinationPortRange: '22'
            access: Allow
            direction: Inbound
          priority: 110
          sourcePortRange: '*'
          destinationAddressPrefix: '*'

        - name: Allow_HTTP
          properties:
            protocol: Tcp
            sourceAddressPrefix: '*'
            destinationPortRange: '80'
            access: Allow
            direction: Inbound
          priority: 120
          sourcePortRange: '*'
          destinationAddressPrefix: '*'

        - name: Allow_HTTPS
          properties:
            protocol: Tcp
            sourceAddressPrefix: '*'
            destinationPortRange: '443'
            access: Allow
            direction: Inbound
          priority: 130
          sourcePortRange: '*'
          destinationAddressPrefix: '*'
